import logging
from prometheus_client import Counter

logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)

REQUEST_COUNT = Counter("http_requests_total", "Total HTTP requests", ["method", "endpoint"])
ERROR_COUNT = Counter("http_errors_total", "Total HTTP errors", ["method", "endpoint"])

def handle_get_users():
    REQUEST_COUNT.labels(method="GET", endpoint="/users").inc()
    logger.info("GET /users")
    return []

def handle_create_user():
    REQUEST_COUNT.labels(method="POST", endpoint="/users").inc()
    logger.info("POST /users")
    return {}

def handle_get_orders():
    REQUEST_COUNT.labels(method="GET", endpoint="/orders").inc()
    logger.info("GET /orders")
    return []

def handle_error():
    ERROR_COUNT.labels(method="GET", endpoint="/users").inc()
    logger.error("Error in GET /users")
